name: Safe synthetic playbook: Data exfiltration heuristic signal
description: Network DLP heuristic where an endpoint shows elevated upload volume toward an uncommon external category. Statistical fixtures only—no covert channels, no tunneling configs, no actual data samples.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Per-host egress baseline computed from lab telemetry window W-72h.
Upload_bytes counter for principal lab-notebook-hailey-14 exceeds sigma threshold fixture.
Classifier labels destination category EXTERNAL_STORAGE_UNK_LAB—not a live hostname dump.

events_emitted.headline: DLP egress threshold crossed
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Fixture counters; does not embed file names or content.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: High-volume egress triggers IR collaboration lane.
Optional enrichment for destination reputation (lab stub, no live queries required).

expected_remediation.summary: Simulated egress policy tightening, CASB inspection enablement suggestion, HR/legal consultation flag (fixture).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Snapshot lab firewall counters for investigative record (stub).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Expanded inspection may intersect privacy regimes; humans gate depth.

expected_final_report.title: Data exfiltration signal — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Statistical egress spike triggered containment planning without asserting theft or exposing file contents.
